description: Small fragment of a family letter in Judaeo-Arabic. Mentions being preoccupied, then, "your mother went to convey your greetings to the wife of Sibāʿ, and his wife said to her that Musāfir behaved with us this year in a reprehensible way...." Potentially related to the family from T-S 13J16.10 (PGPID 3252) and related documents, but there is not enough information to be sure. On verso there appears to be a line of accounting in Arabic script: "the cantor (al-ḥazzān): 7 dirhams." (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: קטע קטן ממכתב משפחתי ביהודית-ערבית. מוזכרים עיסוק, ביקור האם אצל אשת סיבאע ואמירה שמוסאפר 'נהג בנו השנה בצורה מגונה.' בגב: שורת חשבון בכתב ערבי: 'החזן: 7 דרהמים.'
